name: Grapefruit cookie
description:
• Have you heard of most cool cookie! Yup, that's me!!

a very nice cookie with a difficult character, and a lot of energy.can't stand losing, but loves to win! loves active sports and rollerblading. in appearance, this is an ordinary cookie with a ruby-colored bob, in a raspberry suit

SHE IS A CHILD!!
creator: Verukia
